name: CK Life OS - OpenRouter Paid Execution Preflight

parameters.jsCode: const body = $json.body || $json; const tier = body.tier || body.reasoning_tier || 'modest'; const paid = ['modest','expensive','full'].includes(String(tier).toLowerCase()); const approved = body.execute === true && (!paid || body.allow_paid_provider === true) && !!body.approval_reference; return [{ json: { product: 'CK / Life OS', workflow_id: 'ck-life-os-openrouter-paid-execution-preflight', tier, paid, approved, required: ['execute=true', 'allow_paid_provider=true for paid tiers', 'approval_reference', 'OpenRouter credential in n8n or CK runtime'], live_call_allowed: approved, provider_called: false, paid_provider_call: false, rollback: 'No state change in preflight. If a later provider call is made, retain CK receipt and revoke credential/disable workflow if needed.' } }];

staticData.ck_life_os_boundary: disabled import; no paid provider call until exact approval and credential are supplied
